sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَ حَاكِمُ الْمَدِينَةِ مَكْتَبَةً عَامَّةً كَبِيرَةً يَوْمَ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Guverner grada jučer je otvorio veliku javnu biblioteku.
sentences.translationEn: The city governor opened a large public library yesterday.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْمَكْتَبَةُ عَلَى آلَافِ الْكُتُبِ فِي مُخْتَلِفِ الْمَجَالَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka sadrži hiljade knjiga iz različitih oblasti.
sentences.translationEn: The library contains thousands of books in various fields.

sentences.arabic: يُوجَدُ قِسْمٌ خَاصٌّ لِلْأَطْفَالِ وَقَاعَةٌ لِلْمُطَالَعَةِ الْإِلِكْتَرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Postoji poseban odjeljak za djecu i sala za elektronsko čitanje.
sentences.translationEn: There is a special section for children and an electronic reading room.

sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ حَفْلَ الِافْتِتَاحِ عَدَدٌ كَبِيرٌ مِنَ الْمُثَقَّفِينَ وَالْمُوَاطِنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Svečanom otvaranju prisustvovao je veliki broj intelektualaca i građana.
sentences.translationEn: A large number of intellectuals and citizens attended the opening ceremony.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ مَرْكَزًا ثَقَافِيًّا هَامًّا لِلسُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka se smatra važnim kulturnim centrom za stanovnike.
sentences.translationEn: The library is considered an important cultural center for the residents.
